request.description: Challenge verification route used by Meta/Facebook developers dashboard to register the webhook.
Simulates an incoming WhatsApp message event payload received from Meta's Webhook triggers.
Retrieve active WhatsApp conversations grouped by phone number (showing last message and timestamp).
Retrieve full message history log for a specific phone number.
Sends an outgoing free-form custom text message using WhatsApp Cloud API and records it in the message database.
